httpSemantics: Use GET for reads, POST for creation/actions, PATCH for partial updates, and DELETE for cancellation/deletion.
Use 409 for booking overlap, invalid locker operational state, and deletion conflicts.
Use 429 for the locker open once-per-3-minutes rule.
frontendCompatibility: Keep response wrappers consistent so React query/client generation can normalize responses.
Keep visualization endpoint frontend-ready to avoid duplicating business rules in the SPA.
Keep OpenAPI operationId values stable to avoid breaking generated TypeScript clients.
productionReadiness: Document every breaking API change under a new version.
Prefer soft delete for resources with historical bookings.
Use server-side authorization checks even when the frontend hides admin controls.
